name: 7tv-safari
description: Local tooling to build 7TV's WebExtension and convert it into a personal Safari extension project.

scripts.convert:safari:stable: DIST_DIR=upstream/Extension/dist/stable SAFARI_DIR=safari/stable APP_NAME='SevenTV Safari' BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER=dev.local.seventv.safari npm run convert:safari
scripts.convert:safari:nightly: DIST_DIR=upstream/Extension/dist/nightly SAFARI_DIR=safari/nightly APP_NAME='SevenTV Safari Nightly' BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER=dev.local.seventv.safari.nightly npm run convert:safari
scripts.convert:safari:next: DIST_DIR=build/chrome-webstore/7tv-next SAFARI_DIR=safari/next APP_NAME='SevenTV Safari Next' BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER=dev.local.seventv.safari.next npm run convert:safari
scripts.rebuild:safari:stable: npm run sync:stable && npm run build:webextension:stable && npm run convert:safari:stable
scripts.rebuild:safari:nightly: npm run sync:nightly && npm run build:webextension:nightly && npm run convert:safari:nightly
scripts.rebuild:safari:webstore: npm run fetch:webstore:next && npm run convert:safari:next
